Perplexity Computer Update: The Rise of AI Workers

Perplexity just dropped a massive update integrating Claude Code and GitHub CLI, transforming their AI into an autonomous developer. Discover how this new system can fix bugs and submit pull requests entirely on its own, marking the shift from simple chatbots to powerful AI agents.

02:22 - Demo: AI Fixing Bugs Automatically
03:42 - From AI Tools to AI Workers
05:11 - Real-World Use Cases

06:41 - How to Get Started
